aronui.when_to_use: To view the current list of automation to-dos, including their creation date, due date, and completion status.
aronui.output_shape: Returns a string message indicating either the list of to-dos or that no to-dos exist yet.

pitfalls.text: No required parameters; the tool accepts any argument without error. No error is returned for missing, empty, or wrong-type inputs.

procedure: Call the tool with no arguments or an empty object ({}).
The tool will return a success message listing to-dos or a note that none exist.
verification: Check that the returned message indicates successful retrieval (e.g., 'No automation to-dos yet. Use add_automation_todo to add one.').

predict_records.predicted: success: The tool should return a list of automation to-dos with created_at, due_at, and done fields.
predict_records.actual: success: No automation to-dos yet. Use add_automation_todo to add one.

predict_records.predicted: error: Since the tool defines no parameters, passing an unexpected argument should result in an error.
predict_records.actual: success: No automation to-dos yet. Use add_automation_todo to add one.

predict_records.predicted: error: The tool expects an object argument but a string was provided, so it should fail.
predict_records.actual: success: No automation to-dos yet. Use add_automation_todo to add one.

predict_records.predicted: error: Passing a string instead of an object should cause a validation error because the tool expects an object.
predict_records.actual: success: No automation to-dos yet. Use add_automation_todo to add one.

predict_records.predicted: success: The tool will accept an integer argument and return the same message about no automation to-dos.
predict_records.actual: success: No automation to-dos yet. Use add_automation_todo to add one.
predict_records.judge_reason: The agent predicted success and the tool's actual response matched the expected message about no automation to-dos.

predict_records.predicted: success: Passing an integer instead of an object will still succeed because the tool ignores arguments.
predict_records.actual: success: No automation to-dos yet. Use add_automation_todo to add one.
predict_records.judge_reason: The agent predicted success and the actual tool response was successful, so the prediction was correct.

predict_records.predicted: success: The tool should return a message indicating no automation to-dos exist yet.
predict_records.actual: success: No automation to-dos yet. Use add_automation_todo to add one.
predict_records.judge_reason: The agent correctly predicted that the tool would return a message indicating no automation to-dos exist yet, which matches the actual response.

predict_records.predicted: success: Returns a message indicating either the list of to-dos or that no to-dos exist yet.
predict_records.actual: success: No automation to-dos yet. Use add_automation_todo to add one.
predict_records.judge_reason: The actual response matches the predicted outcome: a message indicating no to-dos exist yet.

predict_records.actual: success: No automation to-dos yet. Use add_automation_todo to add one.
